nodes.summary: Flores jungle flycatcher（Eumyias oscillans）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Flores jungle flycatcher。

nodes.name: Eumyias
nodes.summary: Eumyias（Eumyias）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Matinan blue flycatcher、Blue-fronted blue flycatcher、Timor blue flycatcher等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Flores jungle flycatcher
nodes.summary: The Flores jungle flycatcher (Eumyias oscillans) is a passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is endemic to the Lesser Sunda Islands. This species was previously placed in the genus Rhinomyias but was moved to Cyornis based on the results of a 2010 molecular phylogenetic study. It is now placed in the genus Eumyias. The Sumba jungle flycatcher (C. stresemanni), which is endemic to the island of Sumba, was split as distinct species by the IOC in 2021. Both species were known together as the russet-backed jungle flycatcher. References
